RimVore2.QuirkPoolDef.label: Absorption speed
RimVore2.QuirkPoolDef.description: These quirks determine how quickly a pawn absorbs nutrients, energy, and materials from digested prey into their own body, affecting gain rate.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Godlike Absorption
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: Through supernatural power or advanced bio-technology, [PAWN_label] absorbs energy and matter instantly, gaining full benefits the moment digestion begins.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Rapid Absorption
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] absorbs nutrients four times faster than most creatures, turning digested matter into usable energy at extreme speed.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Fast Absorption
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] absorbs nutrients twice as fast as the average predator.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Normal absorption speed
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] absorbs nutrients at a standard, unmodified rate.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Slow Absorption
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] absorbs nutrients only half as fast as most predators, taking longer to gain benefits from meals.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Sluggish Absorption
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] absorbs nutrients just one‑quarter as fast as normal, taking an extremely long time to benefit from digestion.
